---
  title: "Beautiful Photographs MCA Analysis"
  author: "Omar Lizardo"
  date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

# Setup
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
    knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
    library(conflicted)
    library(here)
    library(dplyr)
    library(tidyr)
    library(ggplot2)
    library(sjPlot)
    library(haven)
    library(patchwork)
    library(factoextra)
    library(FactoMineR)
    library(ggrepel)
    library(patchwork)
    library(stringr)
    library(RColorBrewer)
    conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter)
    conflicts_prefer(dplyr::select)
    conflicts_prefer(dplyr::summarize)
```


```{r Getting and Recoding Data}
    source(here("recode.dat.R"))
    dat <- recode.dat() |> 
        select(
            ends_with(".f"), 
            -pol.f, -inq.f, 
            var.photo, 
            landscape:snake, 
            -c(japanese.f:lebanese.f)
            ) |> 
        na.omit()
```

```{r MCA Analysis}
    sups <- which(dat$var.photo <= quantile(dat$var.photo, probs = 0.05))
    mca.res <- MCA(
        dat, graph = FALSE, 
        ind.sup = sups, 
        quali.sup = c(1:12), 
        quanti.sup = 13,
        ncp = 2
        )
    col.names <- paste("Dim.", 1:2, sep = "")
    colnames(mca.res$ind$coord) <- col.names
    colnames(mca.res$ind.sup$coord) <- col.names
    colnames(mca.res$quali.sup$coord) <- col.names
```

```{r Cloud of Categories Plot}
    contrib <- log(mca.res$var$contrib[, 1] + mca.res$var$contrib[, 2])
    contrib <- contrib/max(contrib)
    cat.dat <-data.frame(mca.res$var$coord) |> 
        mutate(labels = rownames(mca.res$var$coord)) |> 
        mutate(judgment = 
                case_when(
                    str_detect(labels, "_Be") ~ "Beautiful",
                    str_detect(labels, "_In") ~ "Interesting",
                    str_detect(labels, "_Me") ~ "Meaningless",
                    str_detect(labels, "_Ug") ~ "Ugly",
                )) 
    p <- ggplot(cat.dat, aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, color = judgment, label = labels))
    p <- p + geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "gray", linewidth = 1)
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray", linewidth = 1)
    p <- p + geom_text_repel(
        size = 7, 
        max.overlaps = 200, 
        fontface = "bold", 
        alpha = contrib,
        key_glyph = "rect"
        )
    p <- p + theme_minimal() + ggtitle("Cloud of Survey Response Options")
    p <- p + scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2", type = "qual", direction = 1) 
    p <- p + labs(
        x = "Interesting \u2190                                                 \u2192 Ugly",
        y = "Beautiful \u2190                                    \u2192 Meaningless"
        )
    p <- p + scale_y_continuous(
        sec.axis = dup_axis(), 
        limits = c(-1.5, 2.25),
        breaks = seq(-1.5, 2.5, by = 0.5)
        )
    p <- p + scale_x_continuous(
        sec.axis = dup_axis(), 
        limits = c(-4.5, 4.5),
        breaks = seq(-4.5, 4.5, by = 0.5)
        )
    p1 <- p + theme(
        legend.position = "bottom",
        title = element_text(size = 32),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 25),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x.top = element_text(size = 32),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 25),
        axis.text.x.top = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 25),
        axis.text.y.right = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y.right = element_text(size = 32)
    ) 
    #+ guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 10)))
    p1
    save_plot(here("Plots", "cat-cloud.png"), height = 50, width = 60) 
```

```{r Cloud of Supplementary Categories Plot}
    contrib <- log(mca.res$quali.sup$cos2[, 1] + mca.res$quali.sup$cos2[, 2])
    contrib <- abs(min(contrib) + 0.01) - abs(contrib)
    contrib = contrib/max(contrib)
    sup.dat <-data.frame(mca.res$quali.sup$coord) |> 
        mutate(labels = rownames(mca.res$quali.sup$coord)) |> 
        mutate(cat.type = c(rep(1, 6), rep(2, 8), rep(3, 10), rep(4, 12), rep(5, 3), rep(3, 3), rep(6, 9), rep(7, 5))) |> 
        mutate(cat.type = factor(cat.type, labels = c("Ethnoracial ID", "Age/Generation", "Cultural Capital", "Economic Capital", "City Size", "Politics/Religion", "Gender/Sexuality")))
    p <- ggplot(sup.dat, aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, color = cat.type, label = labels))
    p <- p + geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "gray", linewidth = 1)
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray", linewidth = 1)
    p <- p + geom_text_repel(
        size = 7, 
        max.overlaps = 200, 
        fontface = "bold", 
        alpha = contrib,
        key_glyph = "rect"
        )
    p <- p + theme_minimal() + ggtitle("Cloud of Socio-Demographic Categories")
    p <- p + scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2", type = "qual", direction = 1) 
    p <- p + labs(
        x = "Interesting \u2190                                          \u2192 Ugly",
        y = "Beautiful \u2190                               \u2192 Meaningless"
        )
    p <- p + scale_y_continuous(
        sec.axis = dup_axis(), 
        limits = c(-0.5, 0.5),
        breaks = seq(-0.5, 0.5, by = 0.1)
        )
    p <- p + scale_x_continuous(
        sec.axis = dup_axis(), 
        limits = c(-0.5, 0.5),
        breaks = seq(-0.5, 0.5, by = 0.1)
        )
    p2 <- p + theme(
        legend.position = "bottom",
        title = element_text(size = 32),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 25),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x.top = element_text(size = 32),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 25),
        axis.text.x.top = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 25),
        axis.text.y.right = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y.right = element_text(size = 32)
        ) + guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
    p2
   save_plot(here("Plots", "sup-cloud.png"), height = 50, width = 60) 
```

```{r}
    wrap_plots(p1, p2, ncol = 1, nrow = 2) + 
        plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'a', tag_suffix = ")")  & 
        theme(plot.tag.position = c(0, 1),
        plot.tag = element_text(size = 42, hjust = 0, vjust = 0.92))
    save_plot(here("Plots", "main.png"), height = 75, width = 65) 
```


```{r Eigenvalue Plot}
    p <- fviz_eig(mca.res, choice = "eigenvalue")
    p <- p + theme(text = element_text(size = 16))
    p + geom_text(label = paste0(round(mca.res$eig[1:10, 2], 1),"%"), vjust=-1, hjust = 0.2,size = 5) + ggtitle("") + ylim(0, 0.2)
    save_plot(here("Plots", "eig.png"), height = 25, width = 20) 
```

<!-- ```{r Bar plots of category importance}
    dim.res <- dimdesc(mca.res, axes = 1:5)
    make.cat.dat <- function(x) {
        w <- data.frame(x) |> 
        mutate(labels = sub(".*=", "", rownames(x))) |> 
        select(-p.value) |> 
        mutate(judgment = 
                case_when(
                    str_detect(labels, "_Be") ~ "Beautiful",
                    str_detect(labels, "_In") ~ "Interesting",
                    str_detect(labels, "_Me") ~ "Meaningless",
                    str_detect(labels, "_Ug") ~ "Ugly",
                )) 
    rownames(w) <- NULL
    return(w)
    }
    make.bar.plot <- function(w, title = "") {
        p <- ggplot(w, aes(x = Estimate, y = reorder(labels, Estimate), fill = judgment, color = judgment))
        p <- p + geom_col() + theme_minimal()
        p <- p + theme(legend.position = "none", 
              legend.title = element_blank(),
              axis.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
              title = element_text(size = 20),
              legend.text = element_text(size = 16)
              ) + labs(x = "", y = "") + ggtitle(title)
        return(p)
    }
    dat1 <- make.cat.dat(dim.res$Dim.1$category) 
    dat1 <- dat1[order(dat1$Estimate), ]
    dat1 <- rbind(tail(dat1, 10), head(dat1, 10))
    dat2 <- make.cat.dat(dim.res$Dim.2$category) 
    dat2 <- dat2[order(dat2$Estimate), ]
    dat2 <- rbind(tail(dat2, 10), head(dat2, 10))
    p3 <- make.bar.plot(dat1, "Dimension 1")
    p4 <- make.bar.plot(dat2, "Dimension 2")
``` -->


<!-- 
```{r Cloud of Variables Plot}
    colnames(mca.res$var$eta2) <- col.names
    cat.dat <-data.frame(mca.res$var$eta2) 
    p <- ggplot(cat.dat, aes(x = Dim.1, y = Dim.2, label = rownames(cat.dat)))
    p <- p + geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "lightgray")
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "lightgray")
    p <- p + geom_label_repel(size = 8, max.overlaps = 75)
    p <- p + theme_minimal()
    p + theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 22),
              axis.title = element_text(size = 24)
              )
    save_plot(here("var-cloud.png"), height = 40, width = 50) 
``` -->

<!-- ```{r Regression Models}
    m1 <- glm(Dim.1 ~ age2 + income + educ + child_arts + workarts + polviews + urban_rural, family = "gaussian", data = dat)
    m2 <- glm(Dim.2 ~ age2 + income + educ + child_arts + workarts + polviews + urban_rural, family = "gaussian", data = dat)
    tab_model(m1, m2, 
        file = here("Tabs", "mca-reg.html"), 
        dv.labels = c(
            "Commonplace Subjects <br> Ugly (v. Beautiful)",
            "Non-standard Subjects <br> Beautiful (v. Meaningless)"
            ),
        CSS = list(css.table = 'font-size: 12px;', css.td = 'border-bottom: 0px;'), 
        show.ci = FALSE,  show.se = TRUE, collapse.se = TRUE, p.style = "numeric_stars", show.std = "std2", show.est = FALSE, digits = 3,
        pred.labels = c("Intercept", "Age", "Household Income", "Education", "Child Arts Exp.", "Work in Arts", "Conservative", "Liberal",  "City Size"),
        title = "Table 1. Coefficient estimates of generalized linear models predicting scores on the first and second MCA dimensions."
        )
```
 -->
